props.title: Open Source Lightweight React JSON Schema Form Library for shadcn/ui
props.description: Build elegant React forms with shadcn/ui components. WorkflowEngine Core + shadcn/ui delivers beautiful, customizable forms built on Radix primitives and Tailwind CSS.

props.title: Why Choose WorkflowEngine Core with shadcn/ui

features.title: Beautiful Design
features.text: shadcn/ui offers elegant, minimalist components that look great by default. Your forms will have a modern, polished appearance.

features.title: Copy-Paste Components
features.text: shadcn/ui components are meant to be copied into your project. You own the code and can customize anything.

features.title: Radix Primitives
features.text: Built on Radix UI, each component is accessible, unstyled at its core, and fully customizable.

features.title: Tailwind CSS
features.text: Style your forms with Tailwind CSS utility classes. Easy to customize colors, spacing, and responsive behavior.

features.title: Accessible by Default
features.text: Radix primitives handle accessibility. Your forms work with screen readers, keyboard navigation, and focus management.

features.title: TypeScript First
features.text: Full TypeScript support with proper types. Get autocomplete and catch errors in your IDE.

features.title: Dark Mode
features.text: shadcn/ui supports dark mode out of the box via CSS variables. Switch themes without extra configuration.

features.title: Form Validation
features.text: Built-in validation with shadcn-styled error messages. Consistent error presentation across all form components.

features.title: Highly Customizable
features.text: Since you own the component code, customize anything. Change animations, add new variants, or modify behavior.

props.title: WorkflowEngine Core + shadcn/ui Power Combo
props.description:
WorkflowEngine Core with shadcn/ui enables developers to rapidly build complex dynamic forms while maintaining a beautiful, customizable design system.

This combination minimizes boilerplate code, delivering seamless integration with the React ecosystem.

No performance compromises — just clean, maintainable form code.

items.title: Lightning-Fast Integration
items.text: Native support for Next.js, Remix, and other React stacks with zero special setup; forms render from a single JSON file featuring conditional logic, multi-language support, and actions (submit, reset). Custom shadcn/ui components integrate effortlessly while preserving TypeScript typing and top-tier performance.

items.title: Minimal Bundle Size
items.text: WorkflowEngine Core boasts a lightweight architecture (188.54KB gzipped), eliminating unnecessary dependencies with tree-shaking optimizations for shadcn/ui components. This accelerates page loads, making it perfect for high-traffic landing pages and PWAs.

props.title: FAQ
props.description: Common questions about using WorkflowEngine with shadcn/ui

faqItems.question: What shadcn/ui components are included?
faqItems.answer: The package includes Input, Textarea, Select, Checkbox, RadioGroup, Switch, Slider, DatePicker, Calendar, Combobox, and more form-related components.

faqItems.question: Do I need Tailwind CSS?
faqItems.answer: Yes. shadcn/ui components are styled with Tailwind CSS. Make sure you have Tailwind configured in your project.

faqItems.question: Can I customize the component styles?
faqItems.answer: Absolutely. shadcn/ui components use Tailwind classes and CSS variables. You can customize colors, spacing, and variants to match your design system.

faqItems.question: Does it support dark mode?
faqItems.answer: Yes. shadcn/ui uses CSS variables for theming. Dark mode works automatically when you toggle the dark class on your root element.

faqItems.question: How do I handle form validation?
faqItems.answer: WorkflowEngine's validation system integrates with shadcn/ui's form styling. Error messages appear with consistent styling using the FormMessage component pattern.

faqItems.question: Can I use custom shadcn/ui variants?
faqItems.answer: Yes. You can pass variant props through WorkflowEngine. If you've created custom variants, they'll work as expected.

props.title: Quick Start with shadcn/ui Components
props.subtitle: Installation
props.description: Install the packages and start building forms with shadcn/ui components. Make sure you have Tailwind CSS configured in your project.

props.title: Need help with shadcn/ui integration?
props.description: Our team can help you get started with WorkflowEngine and shadcn/ui.
